review_scope: OCS LLM cognition end-to-end binding presence
certified_finding: The observed failure is caused by a missing aigol conversation binding to the certified OCS LLM cognition end-to-end runtime. The CLI falls through to the older provider-assisted conversation path and then to a narrow provider-unavailable clarification fallback that fails closed for non-eligible prompts.
root_cause: Missing conversational route and CLI execution binding from broad cognition prompts to AIGOL_OCS_LLM_COGNITION_END_TO_END_V1.
failure_trigger: CONVERSATION_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE_CLARIFICATION_FALLBACK_ARTIFACT_V1 with fallback_status FAILED_CLOSED and failure_reason conversation provider clarification fallback failed closed: prompt is not clarification-eligible.

replay_assessment.reason: The OCS LLM cognition end-to-end runtime is not invoked by the failing conversational CLI branch.

validation.reason: Review-only artifact creation; no runtime code was changed.
